name: The Hack Shack
address: 108 W 39th St Rm 310, New York, NY 10018
about: The Hack Shack is a premier indoor golf facility located in New York City, offering a unique combination of high-level golf technology and a social atmosphere. The venue features Trackman simulators and a wide variety of courses, catering to both beginners and experienced golfers in an inclusive, year-round environment. With no long-term commitments required for memberships and flexible hourly rates, it provides an accessible option for both casual players and dedicated enthusiasts looking to practice or play with friends.
why_golfers_like_it: Top-of-the-line Trackman technology for realistic simulation
Flexible no-commitment membership options with discounted rates
Social atmosphere with food, drinks, and sports viewing
Accommodates both individual practice and group events

food_and_drink.notes: On-site kitchen and food service available
Full bar with adult beverages available

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar technology providing detailed ball and club tracking

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs or rent them on-site. The facility offers club rentals for players who don't have their own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not allowed as The Hack Shack has its own full kitchen and bar serving food and beverages.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typically, a full 18-hole simulation takes approximately 2-3 hours depending on group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is The Hack Shack kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue is designed for adults and adult-oriented social activities, with no specific mention of child-friendly amenities or policies.
